originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&len` is never used.

presenceCondition:
(and (= ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_GZIP true)
     (= ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_BASIC_AUTH true)
     (= BB_MMU false))
model:
(define-fun BB_MMU () Bool
  false)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_GZIP () Bool
  true)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_BASIC_AUTH () Bool
  true)
reasoning: send_headers(): len accumulates sprintf values at L25/L30(BASIC_AUTH)/L36(GZIP), but printf at L38 uses iobuf directly — len never used after last assignment. Dead store. GZIP=T required (content_gzip must be declared for L35). BASIC_AUTH=T and BB_MMU=F are not required. No '// ERROR' → new bug. Over-constrained. Classification: TRUE_NEW_OVER.
